calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2003 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2003 Continued To Nov-04-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR. Patricia M. Evezich #1193.
Appearances:
Anna Gregorian, Esq. for Petitioner, Nen Phan the guardian ad litem for the minor, Anh Phan. The Court approved to have the minor interpreterting for the guardian.
Parties were sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Attorney's fees in the amount of $14,893.00
Medical expenses of $16,319.00
Costs of $428.00
A net balance of $28,360.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with
Bank Of America 1525 Market & Van Ness, San Francisco, until minor's reaches the age of 18. The minor was born on Sept. 15, 1987.
Order signed in open court.
